name: ONYPHE
description: ONYPHE is a cyber defense search engine that aggregates open-source and cyber threat intelligence data collected by crawling various sources on the Internet. It provides IP, domain, and hostname intelligence with geolocation, threat lists, vulnerability scanning, and WHOIS data.

actions.name: IP Summary
actions.description: Get a comprehensive summary of all available data for an IP address including geolocation, open ports, services, vulnerabilities, threat list membership, and WHOIS data.

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to look up

actions.name: Domain Summary
actions.description: Get a comprehensive summary of all available data for a domain including DNS records, subdomains, SSL certificates, and associated infrastructure.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: The domain name to look up

actions.name: Hostname Summary
actions.description: Get a comprehensive summary of all available data for a specific hostname (FQDN) including DNS resolution, services, and SSL certificates.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The fully-qualified hostname to look up (e.g., 'www.example.com')

actions.name: IP Geolocation
actions.description: Get geolocation data for an IP address including country, city, coordinates, ASN, and organization.

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to geolocate

actions.name: IP Threat List Check
actions.description: Check whether an IP address appears on any threat intelligence lists tracked by ONYPHE, indicating potential malicious activity.

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to check against threat lists

actions.name: IP Vulnerability Scan
actions.description: Retrieve vulnerability scan results for an IP address showing detected CVEs and security weaknesses.

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to get vulnerability data for

actions.name: IP WHOIS
actions.description: Retrieve WHOIS registration data for an IP address including network block, organization, and allocation details.

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address to get WHOIS data for

actions.name: Search
actions.description: Search the ONYPHE database using the ONYPHE Query Language (OQL) to filter across all data categories.
